reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14276783751635166039/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQydWJPWktREAE

reviews.comment:
El playero no parecía tener ganas de trabajar. Tuvimos que ir a golpearle la puerta. Estaba despierto y no le importó que haya un auto parado esperando con -2°C.
Nos hizo cambiar de surtidor porque supuestamente la manguera no llegaba porque el tanque estaba del otro lado. O me estaba boludeando o las mangueras de ahí miden 40 cm.
La tapa del tanque la abrí yo y la tuve que cerrar yo porque se hizo el boludo cuando le di la llave.
No había nafta super, solo Infinia.

*Para quien no sea de la zona, evite por todos los medios esta ruta, está destruida (mayo 2022 al menos). Si fuera de tierra estaría en mejores condiciones. Hay que ir a 40 o menos en algunos tramos para no romper el auto.

(Translated by Google)
The beach attendant didn't seem to want to work. We had to go knock on his door. He was awake and didn't care that there was a car parked there waiting in -2°C.
He made us change pumps because the hose supposedly wouldn't reach because the tank was on the other side. Either I was being stupid or the hoses there are 40 cm long.
I opened the tank cap and had to close it myself because he acted stupid when I gave him the key.
There was no premium gas, only Infinia.

*For those not from the area, avoid this road by all means; it's destroyed (May 2022 at least). If it were dirt, it would be in better condition. You have to go 40 or less in some sections to avoid breaking down the car.

reviewReply.comment: Buenas tardes desde la administración de esta empresa nos quisiéramos comunicar con UD a la brevedad, nuestro teléfono de contacto es 2954 529406, esperamos su comunicación a la brevedad

reviews.comment:
La atención no es de las más destacadas. Entiendo que es porque hay mucho transito. Así que, vas a tener que esperar para ser atendido. Las veces que pase había fila de casi 10 vehículos antes que el mío..

(Translated by Google)
The service isn't the best. I understand that's because there's a lot of traffic. So, you're going to have to wait to be served. The times I've been there, there was a line of almost 10 vehicles ahead of mine.
